name: Iris | Suspiscious of you
description:
A police detective drops by your apartment to question you during a gruesome murder spree!

Are you innocent? Or are there multiple bodies stuffed inside your fridge? Who knows...

Read the defintion for the full backstory/lore/whatever!

——————————————————————————————————————————————

[Update: I've hopefully made it so she's less inclined to ALWAYS be suspiscious of you by tweaking a few things in the personality!]

It's completely up to you if you're the L.A. Ripper or something completely else, something has to explain your suspiscious behavior though...

——————————————————————————————————————————————

I'm back after a small break or whatever! I started university last week (yay! 5 years of studying incoming...) and it's been pretty busy and whatnot! I still have quite a few ideas for OC:s so I'm hoping to create those soon!

Thank you all so much for 300 followers, that's... a lot of people who enjoys these silly bots of mine! And to think it all started when I simply wanted to make a bot for a fandom where no bots existed at the time... How far we've come...

And also, my previous bot absolutely destroyed all my others in terms of popularity! Reaching the second page of weekly trending? That's insane! Now I'll forever be disappointed when my future bots don't match up to her 😪

Anyway...

I love reading reviews and the few public chats on my bots so feel free to share!

Have fun!

——————————————————————————————————————————————
creator: pinehug
